description:
When I step into this situation, I’m not just working with a dog.
I’m working with a relationship that’s out of balance.
Bella, a four-year-old French bulldog, has been attacking other dogs and even biting people at her meetup group. And because of that behavior, her owner, Katherine, is at risk of being completely excluded from a community that means everything to her.
But when I observe Bella, I don’t see a bad dog.
I see a dog who has taken on the role of leader.
From the moment they arrive,
title: How to Stop a Dog From Attacking Other Dogs in Public | Cesar 911
